sections.paragraph: pers. pron. pl. m. they, those; sometimes it is incorrectly put for the feminine, eœ. Zec 5:10 Rth 1:22.-With the article it becomes the demonstrative, these; see הוּא .-Not unfrequently it takes in a manner the place of the verb substantive, 1Ki 8:40 9:20 Gen 25:16 even with feminines, Son 6:8 and for the second person, Zep 2:12, “you also, O Cushites, חַלְלֵי חַרְבִּי הֵמָּה shall be stricken through with my sword.” Compare הוּא.
